code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  mut cur_max = 0
  mut first = true
  while j < nums.len()
    let val = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if first
      cur_max = val
      first = false
    else
      if val > cur_max
        cur_max = val
      end
    end
    mut result = list.push(result, cur_max)
    j = j + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < result.len()
    let v = match result.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
